sections.paragraph:
Original: עטרת עטרות

Transliteration: ‛ăṭârôth ‛ăṭârôth

Phonetic: at-aw-roth'

BDB Definition:

Ataroth = "crowns"
  1. a town east of the Jordan in Gilead, taken and built by the tribe of Gad
  2. a place on the boundary of Ephraim and Manasseh
  3. a place between Ephraim and Benjamin

Origin: pl of H5850

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
